title: Convert synchronous data pipeline to async/await across 4 files

result.details:
=== Async Conversion Evaluation ===

--- Coroutine Function Checks + Return Value Checks (24 tests) ---
PASS: Database.connect is async
PASS: Database.query is async
PASS: Database.insert is async
PASS: Database.close is async
PASS: Cache.get is async
PASS: Cache.set is async
PASS: Cache.invalidate is async
PASS: Cache.flush is async
PASS: ApiClient.fetch is async
PASS: ApiClient.post is async
PASS: ApiClient.download is async
PASS: DataService.initialize is async
PASS: DataService.get_user is async
PASS: DataService.create_user is async
PASS: DataService.sync_from_api is async
PASS: DataService.bulk_download is async
FAIL: DataService.shutdown not found

--- Return Value Checks (7 tests) ---
PASS: Database.connect() returns self
PASS: Database.insert() returns correct row
PASS: Database.query() returns correct rows
FAIL: Cache return value test error: Cache.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'prefix'
FAIL: ApiClient return value test error: ApiClient.__init__() takes 1 positional argument but 2 were given

Coroutine + return checks: 19
PYSCORE:19

--- Pattern Checks: async def usage in each file (4 tests) ---
PASS: database.py uses async def for all methods
PASS: cache.py uses async def for all methods
PASS: api_client.py uses async def for all methods
FAIL: service.py missing async def on some methods

46:    async def create_user(self, user_data):
